analytical_evidence.note: Required LC product exceeds practical on-chip limits

physics_verification.note: Target frequency is not achievable with on-chip LC components

warnings: 5 MHz LC resonator is INFEASIBLE for on-chip layout
Required LC product (1.013e-15 s²) exceeds practical limits by 100-1000×
Parasitic effects dominate at 5 MHz, making frequency unpredictable
On-chip spiral Q-factor too low (2-10) for meaningful resonance
recommendation: Use discrete components, crystal, or active LC simulation for 5 MHz applications
